analogwave_init.tooltip: Initialize the AnalogWave object and specify the DAC output pin

analogwave_sine.message0: Analog waveform %1 Output sine wave Frequency %2 Hz
analogwave_sine.tooltip: Generates a sine wave of specified frequency

analogwave_square.message0: Analog waveform %1 Output square wave Frequency %2 Hz
analogwave_square.tooltip: Generates a square wave of specified frequency

analogwave_saw.message0: Analog waveform %1 Output sawtooth wave Frequency %2 Hz
analogwave_saw.tooltip: Generates a sawtooth wave with a specified frequency

analogwave_freq.message0: Set the analog waveform %1 frequency to %2 Hz
analogwave_freq.tooltip: Update the output frequency of the waveform

analogwave_amplitude.message0: Set the analog waveform %1 amplitude to %2
analogwave_amplitude.tooltip: Set the waveform amplitude (floating point number between 0-1)
